label: TSMM to TRQP binding
description: Maps TRQP stack concepts into TSMM abstractions so TSMM can act as the semantic layer across assurance, conformance, and trusted service provider publication flows.

mappings.description: Authority defining operating rules, publication criteria, and acceptable evidence.
The published ecosystem participant whose assertions and status are evaluated.
conditions: May be modeled as Agent where service acts autonomously.

mappings.description: Evidence submitted to substantiate conformance or operational trust posture.
Profile determining required controls and evidence depth.
Actor depending on registry-mediated trust decisions downstream.

notes: TRQP publication flows can be expressed as TSMM graph instances and surfaced through the TSMM registry format.
This binding is intentionally semantic rather than normative and does not override TRQP wording.
